goal: v1.1 首切：ReadingPane 选择消息并编辑后发布

summary.title: ReadingPane 支持选择消息编辑后发布
summary.what: 实现 v1.1 首个 selected-share 切片：ReadingPane 每条消息可勾选，选中后显示 inline textarea 供发布前编辑；顶部 selection bar 展示选择数量、Select all/Clear、Share selected。前端把选中的 {id, order, content} POST 到既有 /api/v1/sessions/:id/share。后端保持空 body = 全量发布，同时支持 messages body：从 cxs messages 中按 id/order 取原消息，只允许覆盖 content，合成 selected transcript 后复用 renderTranscript 和 PublishClient 发布。selected artifact 使用独立 html cache 文件名和基于选择内容的 sourceHash。补 dashboard 集成测试、README、design、dogfood 与 PRD 说明。
summary.why: CI 与 Worker smoke 已完成后，计划中的 v1.1 首选能力是 Turn/message 级裁剪 + 编辑后发布。先落 message 级最小切片，可以满足从长 session 中挑出可分享片段的核心需求，同时避免一次性引入 Shiki、Published 独立视图、message anchor 或 Shortcut drag。
summary.user_goal: v1.1 首切：ReadingPane 选择消息并编辑后发布

decisions.chose: 复用 POST /api/v1/sessions/:id/share，空 body 仍全量发布，可选 body {messages:[{id,order,content}]} 走 selected publish
decisions.rationale: 不新增路由，保持 Share 行为集中；旧客户端不传 body 完全兼容。

decisions.chose: selected publish 使用 cxs messages 表的 message rows 合成 Transcript，而不是重读原 JSONL 再反向映射
decisions.rationale: ReadingPane 展示的就是 cxs message rows，id/order 与 UI 一致；避免 parser timeline 和 cxs seq 的对应复杂度。

decisions.chose: 用户只能覆盖已选消息的 content，role/timestamp/order 仍来自 cxs
decisions.rationale: 满足文本编辑后发布，同时避免客户端伪造角色、时间或工具结构。

decisions.chose: 在 ReadingPane 直接勾选消息，选中后 inline textarea 编辑，selection bar 负责数量预览和 Share selected
decisions.rationale: 最小实现，用户不用切到单独编辑页；数量预览满足当前计划，复杂 preview modal 延后。

decisions.chose: selected share 用 session id + selected sourceHash 前缀生成独立 html 文件名
decisions.rationale: 避免不同选择/编辑版本互相覆盖同一个 session html cache。

rejected.reason: 会扩大接口面；既有 share endpoint 带可选 body 即可兼容表达。

rejected.alternative: 在 v1.1 首切实现真正 turn 级、message anchor、Shiki 或 Published 独立管理 UI
rejected.reason: 计划明确暂不混入这些；当前目标是最小可用 selected publish。

rejected.alternative: 允许客户端提交完整 message/role/timestamp 结构
rejected.reason: 不必要且更容易伪造上下文；服务端保留 cxs 原始元数据更安全。

review_notes: 验证：npm run verify 通过（lint + 42/42 tests + build）。
验证：npm --prefix web run build 通过。
验证：新增 dashboard 测试确认 selected share 的 HTML 包含编辑后文本、不包含未选消息，响应不泄漏 delete token。
验证：live Worker selected smoke 通过：发布 1 条编辑后的选中消息，public URL 返回 200 且包含 marker，unpublish 后返回 410 unpublished；what7 list --json 不出现 deleteCapability。
运行态副作用：本机 what7 state 新增一条已 unpublished 的 selected-share 历史记录；未提交 secret/public URL/delete capability。

architectural_claims: POST /api/v1/sessions/:id/share is now a compatible union: empty body publishes full transcript; messages body publishes selected/edited message subset.
Selected shares are synthetic clean transcripts built from cxs message rows and rendered through the same renderTranscript pipeline as full shares.
Frontend selected-share state is local ReadingPane UI state; no selected draft is persisted to state.json.
behavioral_changes: ReadingPane shows per-message checkboxes and a selection bar with selected count, Select all, Clear, and Share selected.
Selected messages switch from rendered markdown to editable textarea before publishing.
Share selected publishes only chosen messages with edited content, then copies/returns the public URL through the same toast path as full Share.
Normal Share remains available and still publishes the full transcript.
Selected share records use titles ending in selected and separate cached HTML paths keyed by selected content hash.

api_changes.signature: POST /api/v1/sessions/:id/share optional JSON body { messages: [{ id, order, content }] }

security_implications: Client selected-share input is limited to selecting existing cxs messages by id/order and optionally overriding content; role/order/timestamp are server-derived.
Safe share responses and list output continue omitting deleteCapability.
Edited content still passes through the existing renderTranscript redaction pipeline before publishing.
migration_notes: No migration required; existing share endpoint and records remain compatible.
